
=== RATING ALGORITHM COMPARISON ===

=== RECOMMENDATION ===
Best overall fair algorithm: ZERO-SUM perPlayer k56 mw0.1
  - logLoss: 0.6794
  - Brier: 0.2432
  - calMAE: 0.0475
  - partnerDiff: 76.3%
  - absDrift: 0.0000 (OK)
  - meanRating: 1500.0, ratingStd: 40.0

Best long-term health: ZERO-SUM perPlayer k48 mw0.1
  - calMAE: 0.0297, totalDrift: 0, ratingStd: 44.0, partnerDiff: 82.4%

Best predictive backtest: proposed first_observed k=20 mw=0.1
  - logLoss: 0.6830, Brier: 0.2450, accuracy: 64.5%, upsetAcc: 181.6%

Best singles:doubles balance: K_SINGLES=24, K_DOUBLES=48 (ratio 0.92)

Composite weights: short-term = logLoss 25%, Brier 20%, calMAE 25%, absDrift 15%, (1-partnerDiff) 15%
Long-term = calMAE 40%, totalDrift 25%, ratingStd 20%, (1-partnerDiff) 15%. Lower composite = better.
Drift flagged HIGH when >0.03 per match.
